title: Home Loan Documents Required
intro: When applying for a home loan, lenders require specific documents to process and approve your application. Submitting complete and accurate documents ensures faster verification and smooth loan approval.

sections.content: Without submitting the required documents, a home loan application cannot be processed. Lenders carefully verify every document before approving a loan, making it essential for applicants to understand the documentation requirements.

While the document list is largely similar across lenders, it may vary slightly depending on the lender, applicant profile, and loan type. These documents usually include KYC, income proof, and property-related documents.
Basic Documents Required for Home Loan

items: Completed and signed home loan application form
Bank statement or passbook with address
Latest balance sheet and profit & loss statement
Copy of valid passport and visa
Appointment letter with latest salary slips
Sale deed or agreement to sell
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from builder or society
Land or building tax paid receipts
Advance payment receipt made to builder

sections.content: Submitting the right documents is a critical step in the home loan process. Keeping all documents ready in advance helps speed up verification and increases the chances of quick loan approval.
